meta.title: Cards Grid
meta.description: A responsive grid displaying multiple cards with optional images, titles, descriptions, and tertiary buttons with arrow icons

parentTsx: import { useBlockProps, InspectorControls, BlockControls, useInnerBlocksProps } from '@wordpress/block-editor';
import { PanelBody, RangeControl, ToolbarButton, ToolbarGroup } from '@wordpress/components';

requiredPatterns.usage: Wrap optional content areas in editor
Sync block name in list view with heading/title content
requiredPatterns.implementation: Call in ThemeHeading onChange (parent) and RichText onChange (child)

requiredPatterns.note: Must mirror TSX cn() calls exactly
Accepts string or array with conditions
Use with allowedBlocks and renderAppender: false

requiredPatterns.usage: Pass columns setting from parent to child
requiredPatterns.note: Child uses context to adjust grid behavior

parent.wrapperProps: useBlockProps() in TSX, theme_block_props() in PHP
parent.darkModeWrapper: Conditional pseudo-element charcoal card around container content

child.wrapperProps: useBlockProps() in TSX, theme_block_props() in PHP
child.card: div with bg-accent, rounded corners, padding, flex column
child.imageArea: Optional image with aspect ratio, hidden if not set
child.contentArea: Title, description, button with flex-col layout

qualityChecklist: TSX and PHP produce identical HTML structure
All conditional classes match between TSX and PHP
No hardcoded colors - uses theme tokens only
Uses shouldDisplay() for optional content in editor
Parent provides context, child consumes it
Semantic HTML elements (section, article, h3, etc.)
Equal height cards via CSS Grid items-stretch
Image hidden completely when not set (no placeholder rectangle)

parent.name: darkMode
parent.description: Enable dark mode with charcoal card background

parent.name: columns
parent.description: Number of columns on desktop (1, 2, or 3)

child.name: image
child.description: Optional card image with focal point
child.source: spec - images only, hidden if not set

context.usage: Child blocks receive columns setting to adjust layout if needed

section.note: Dark mode uses transparent section with pseudo-element card

container.darkMode: relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8 md:before:py-24
container.note: Dark mode 96px (py-24 = 96px) extra top/bottom padding on tablets+ per spec

grid.note: Mobile always 1 column, tablet max 2, desktop respects attribute

wrapper.note: Full height for equal-height grid items

card.classes: w-full h-full bg-accent rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col
card.note: Accent color background, flex column for content alignment

imageContainer.conditionalDisplay: Only render if image.id is set
imageContainer.note: Image container hidden completely when no image - no empty rectangle

image.component: ImageDropUploader in TSX, wp_get_attachment_image in PHP

content.note: Padding matches CardsCarouselItem, flex-1 for remaining space

button.className: btn-tertiary-arrow text-charcoal! text-left! group inline-flex items-center gap-2

afterContent.wrapperClasses: shrink-0 inline-flex items-center justify-center w-6 h-6 rounded-full transition-all group-hover:bg-charcoal group-hover:text-neon-green group-focus:bg-charcoal group-focus:text-neon-green

button.source: spec - tertiary button with arrow via afterContent param

mobile.note: Always 1 column regardless of attribute setting

tablet.note: Max 2 columns per spec - if attribute is 3, show 2 on tablet

darkModePadding.tablet: 96px top/bottom on charcoal card via md:before:py-24
darkModePadding.note: Per spec: 96px padding on tablets and up in dark mode

parent.noHeading: Hide heading area, still show grid

child.noImage: Hide image container completely (no empty rectangle)

editorBehavior.parentBlockNaming: renameBlock() synced to heading via ThemeHeading
editorBehavior.childBlockNaming: renameBlock() synced to title via RichText

equalHeight.note: All cards in a row have same height, content fills via flex-1

cards.buttonFocus: Clear focus states on tertiary button

images.alt: Required via media library or manual entry

componentModifications.modification: Add arrow to tertiary button using the afterContent parameter
componentModifications.implementation: Already supported via 'after' prop in ThemeButton.tsx and 'after' arg in ThemeButton.php
componentModifications.note: No modification needed - ThemeButton already supports before/after content injection
componentModifications.source: spec requirement, verified in ThemeButton.tsx and ThemeButton.php

decisions.question: Should cards be inner blocks or an array attribute?
decisions.evidence: Spec states 'Each card should be an inner block'
decisions.rationale: Inner blocks provide better editing experience and follow CardsCarousel pattern

decisions.question: What color should card backgrounds use?
decisions.evidence: Spec states 'their background be the accent color'
decisions.rationale: Uses theme's accent color system for flexibility

decisions.question: How should dark mode be implemented?
decisions.decision: Follow ContentWithMedia pattern with pseudo-element charcoal card
decisions.evidence: Spec says 'Check ContentWithMedia for dark mode implementation'
decisions.rationale: Consistent pattern across blocks, already documented

decisions.question: What padding should dark mode have on tablets+?
decisions.evidence: Spec states '96px (or similar) on tablets and up'

decisions.question: What column options should be available?
decisions.evidence: Spec states 'option to define how many columns: 1, 2, or 3'

decisions.question: How should columns behave responsively?
decisions.decision: Mobile: 1, Tablet: max 2, Desktop: attribute value
decisions.evidence: Spec states 'mobile just 1 column, tablets up to 2 columns'

decisions.question: Should cards have equal height?
decisions.decision: Yes, via CSS Grid default items-stretch
decisions.evidence: Spec states 'All columns should have the same height'
decisions.rationale: Grid items stretch by default, use flex-1 on content for alignment

decisions.question: What media types are allowed?
decisions.decision: Images only, hidden if not set
decisions.evidence: Spec states 'only type of media allowed is images, if not added their rectangle won't show up'
decisions.rationale: No video support, image container completely hidden when empty

decisions.question: What button style should cards use?
decisions.decision: Tertiary button with arrow icon via afterContent
decisions.evidence: Spec states 'use tertiary button, add arrow using afterContent parameter'
decisions.rationale: Matches CardsCarouselItem pattern, ThemeButton already supports this

decisions.question: Should this use Swiper carousel or CSS Grid?
decisions.evidence: Block is named 'CardsGrid' not 'CardsCarousel', no carousel controls mentioned
decisions.rationale: Grid layout is simpler and matches the 'grid' name

decisions.question: What border radius should cards have?
What padding should card content have?
decisions.evidence: CardsCarouselItem uses 'p-6 md:p-8' for card content

decisions.question: What aspect ratio should card images have?
decisions.rationale: Standard landscape ratio, works well with card layout

decisions.question: What gap should the grid have?

notes: Test at mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1440px)
Verify columns: mobile always 1, tablet max 2, desktop respects attribute
Check equal height behavior - all cards in a row should be same height
Verify image container is completely hidden when no image is set
Check dark mode pseudo-element charcoal card and 96px tablet+ padding
Test button arrow hover state (charcoal bg, neon-green text)
Verify shouldDisplay() shows placeholders in editor but hides on frontend

tokenUsage.note: Figma tools unavailable - spec generated from requirements and reference patterns
